headline: Leaked iPhone 18 Pro photos reportedly wound up on the dark web
summary: Leaked iPhone 18 Pro photos surfaced on the dark web. Images reportedly show a three-camera layout and Apple logo. The breach affected an Apple supplier, according to Reuters.

headline: Tidal won’t pay royalties on AI-generated music but isn’t banning it outright
summary: Tidal updated policies on AI-generated music, protecting artists. AI tracks will be labeled but not banned from July 15th. However, these tracks will no longer be monetizable.

headline: Sony’s next-gen PlayStation will go ‘beyond the living room’
summary: Sony hints at a future PlayStation experience "beyond the living room." This suggests new ways to play games outside the home. The statement came during an investor Q&A about the next-gen console.

headline: OpenAI is teasing new hardware… for Codex
summary: OpenAI teased new hardware related to its AI coding tool, Codex. A video shows a square device with buttons, launching July 15th. It's designed to upgrade "Codex shortcuts."

headline: Box Office Disaster Supergirl Could Reportedly Lose Warner Bros. $100 Million During Its Theatrical Run
summary: The Supergirl movie is projected to be a box office disaster. Warner Bros. could reportedly lose over $100 million. This loss is anticipated during its full theatrical run.

headline: Today’s Best Deals: Switch 2 Memory Card, Resident Evil Requiem, MTG x Marvel, and More
summary: Discover today's top gaming and tech deals. Find sales on Switch 2 memory cards and Resident Evil Requiem. Don't miss Nintendo's Summer Sale and MTG x Marvel discounts.

headline: Tribeca Fest-Winning Filmmaker Says He Wants to Make a 3D Shooter with Murderous Bunnies and Carrots as Loot
summary: Tribeca winner Wesley Wang plans a new 3D shooter game. The game will feature "murderous bunnies." Carrots will be used as in-game loot.

headline: Save Big on Hisense TVs for 4th of July, All Under $1,000
summary: Hisense is offering major TV deals for the 4th of July. All featured Hisense TVs are priced under $1,000. It's a prime opportunity for holiday savings on new TVs.

headline: New 'No 10 North' plan will rebalance power in Britain, Burnham promises
summary: Andy Burnham proposes a 'No 10 North' plan for Britain. The plan aims to rebalance power through devolution. Burnham promises "good growth in every postcode."

headline: Will Andy Burnham's devolution plan raise economic growth?
summary: BBC Verify investigates Andy Burnham's devolution plan. The analysis focuses on its potential economic impact. It questions if further devolution will boost UK growth.

headline: Resident doctors in England accept pay deal and end strikes
summary: Resident doctors in England accepted a new pay deal. This agreement ends a three-year dispute with the government. The resolution brings an end to repeated doctor strikes.

headline: 'They are hoping beyond hope': Rescue efforts continue at collapsed La Guaira building
summary: Rescue operations continue at a collapsed La Guaira building. At least 1,700 fatalities are confirmed from the disaster. Hope remains for finding more survivors amidst the rubble.
